_comment: Normalisation baselines for the composite formulas in the tech spec. GPR baseline is computed live from the source spreadsheet's own 2000-2015 window (real, reproducible). The others have no live historical baseline feed (their current values may come from a live pull -- see pipeline.py -- but the min/max window used to normalise them is still an editorial estimate until a historical series is pulled for each).

dollar_share_gold_incl.note: current value now comes from live IMF COFER SDMX pull + live gold price; this min/max baseline window is still an editorial estimate -- replace with a real COFER 2000-2015 series pull to fully retire the editorial flag

treasuries_vs_gold_ratio.note: ratio = treasuries_usd_bn / gold_usd_bn; replace once historical TIC-official + gold series exist

cb_gold_purchases_trailing_4q_tonnes.note: WGC has no API/history feed; editorial estimate

cross_bloc_penalty.note: no live feed exists per spec; editorial estimate

gdelt_conflict_tone_30d.note: GDELT has no packaged historical baseline API for a custom query; editorial estimate based on typical observed range for the conflict/tariff/sanctions query -- min end skews toward crisis coverage, max toward calmer periods. Norm is inverted in pipeline.py since more negative tone means more tension.
